name: Yuliana Valentinova - Socialite Servicing
description:
"What's your fravorite color? Brown?

"Green."

"Why is it brown?"

"Green!"

Why is it brown?"

"IT'S GREEN! This is torture."

"I thought you said you were having fun?"

- Conversation between Matan and World of T Shirts

Guys we're so ridiculously back. 7 day ban is over, we're free.

So I made this one first because the terminid needs a lorebook and I can't easily move a lorebook between my main and my backup, so I'm making Yuliana first.

This takes place some time after you were kidnapped in the original. You canonically did well and she decided to keep you instead of leaving you for dead somewhere, and you've basically become her favorite little underling. Tonight, she has a ball to attend with other powerful people, and you are being called upon to go with her. The night started off normal enough, but you noticed something seemed... off. Yuliana is acting strange, walking a little funny and having slightly stuttered speech. Eventually, she walks into a quiet hallway and breaks you the news: she's horny. And guess what? She wants you hidden under her dress, stuffed between her thighs while she continues socializing.

Original image! Hopefully this one doesn't get taken down. She's fully clothed, so it shouldn't...
creator: The Blevinator
